'''Tertiary Kesmere''' was a [[Cloud/Legends|cloudy]], storm-wracked [[Planet/Legends|world]]<ref name="Wizards" /> located in the [[Tertiary Kesmere system/Legends|Tertiary Kesmere system]], a part of the [[Raioballo sector/Legends|Raioballo sector]] in the [[New Territories/Legends|New Territories]] portion of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="TEA" /> It was the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the<ref name="CSWE" /> [[Limb/Legends|winged]]<ref name="Wizards" /> [[hornagaunt]] [[Species/Legends|species]],<ref name="CSWE" /> including the wing-clipped pet [[Grendel]].<ref name="Wizards" /> Between [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]] and [[12 ABY/Legends|12 ABY]], Tertiary Kesmere fell within the borders of the [[Pentastar Alignment]].<ref name="TEA" />

==Behind the scenes==
Tertiary Kesmere was first mentioned in "Mission 4: Showdown on the ''Sulon Star''," the fourth installment in "[[Kyle Katarn's Tale]]," a series of five scenarios for use with the [[Wizards of the Coast]] [[Star Wars Miniatures|''Star Wars'' Miniatures]] game. The series was written by [[Abel G. Peña]] and [[Jason Fry]], and the fourth scenario was published on [[Wizards.com]] on [[May 5]], [[2005]].<ref name="Wizards" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Tertiary Kesmere [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore Tertiary Kesmere itself, in grid square L-4.<ref name="TEA" />
